violations.text: No person in charge (with a completed food safety manager course from an accredited institution) was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a table. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cheese) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Containers are being used as scoops in bins of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

The establishment does not have adequate hot water. The establishment must have a water temperature of 85 degrees Fahrenheit or higher in order to properly wash hands. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
